title: stenogyne oblonga
intro: Stenogyne oblonga, also known as Ma'o, is a type of flowering plant native to Hawaii. This plant is traditionally used in Hawaiian herbal medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Stenogyne oblonga include wound healing, antiseptic properties, and potential anti-cancer and antifungal activities. Stenogyne oblonga can be prepared as a topical salve or infused oil for use in herbal remedies, and it is also sometimes used in traditional Hawaiian ceremonies and rituals.
